title: Marketplace Manager - Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates:
Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
